candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line and matches Total Revenue numerically; good fallback if label changes over time.
Explicit total revenue line with same values as Operating revenues; best single top-line revenue label.

variables.notes: Both 'Total Revenue' and 'Operating revenues' represent the same top-line; using them as a priority list for consistency over time.

candidates.why: Candidate list suggests this but it is clearly SG&A, not cost of goods sold.
More like SG&A personnel expenses than direct cost of sales in this context.
Residual admin costs, part of SG&A, not direct production costs.
Misc operating expenses, not specifically cost of revenues.
Net operating result, not pure cost of sales.
Financing expense, not COGS.
Balance sheet accrual, not the income statement cost of sales line.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. True COGS is reported as 'Cost of Revenues - Total', which is not in the provided candidate list but clearly represents direct costs associated with revenue. candidates.why: Explicit administrative overhead; a core SG&A component.
Residual admin overhead; also SG&A.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. SG&A consists of multiple overhead components. Besides the listed candidates, 'Legal and advisory services', 'Labor & Related Expenses', and 'Other expenses' are clearly operating overhead and not COGS, D&A, impairments, interest, or taxes. Included these additional rows from the full A-column because the candidate list omits obvious SG&A components; please confirm this broader grouping. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Legal and advisory services, [Income Statement] Labor & Related Expenses, [Income Statement] Other expenses
No line item related to research and development appears in the income statement; R&D is likely not separately reported.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line; best representation of financing cost.
Represents allocation of profit, not interest expense.
Balance sheet debt balance, not an interest expense flow.
Current portion of debt, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Selected the explicit interest expense line; other candidates are equity or debt balance items, not expenses.

candidates.row_label: Loss on derivative contracts reclassified from equity
candidates.why: OCI reclassification item, not an equity balance.
Represents net income attributable to equity holders, not the equity balance sheet total.
Equity attributable to shareholders (owners) excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Includes both shareholders' equity and non-controlling interests; would double-count with MIB.
Balancing line, not the primary equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not a pure equity measure.
Represents total assets/liabilities, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Using shareholders’ equity attributable to owners, which excludes non-controlling interests and avoids double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Represents profit attributable to NCI, confirming presence of minority interests but not the balance sheet amount.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests in equity; directly matches MIB definition.
Synonymous with non-controlling interest; duplicate representation across periods.
Income statement allocation, not the equity balance, but confirms terminology.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet minority interest lines. Both 'Minority Interest' and 'Non-controlling interest' represent the same concept; included as a priority list in case naming changes over time.
